overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban downtown area. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses streets, and explores a waterfront area beneath an elevated highway, with the '666th Street' building serving as a prominent landmark throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with commercial billboards

events.description: character stops walking to check handheld device, then resumes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, briefly stopping to check a device in hand

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for synthetic meat product on green building facade
tall black building with prominent '666th Street' holographic signage
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
modern street lamp with orange accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit futuristic city sidewalk with the massive '666th Street' building dominating the right side. Digital billboards and palm trees line the left side of the street. The character briefly stops to check a handheld device around the 8-second mark while pedestrians walk in various directions.

events.description: character steps off sidewalk and crosses the asphalt street toward fuel station

agents.ego_description: crossing the street diagonally toward a fuel station, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray hoodie walking in same direction toward fuel station

entered.detail: tall vertical sign displaying fuel prices in digital numbers with 'FUEL' and 'CHOOH2' labels
small yellow and green fuel station building with green awning

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt street toward a fuel station with a prominent price sign. The '666th Street' building recedes into the background as the character approaches the yellow fuel kiosk. Other pedestrians are seen crossing the intersection in different directions.

events.description: camera begins tilting upward to view the elevated highway structure overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk parallel to the street, approaching the waterfront area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street
large industrial pipes running along the waterfront edge
cluster of futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers in the background

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the sidewalk as the environment transitions toward an industrial waterfront district. The massive elevated highway structure becomes visible overhead, and industrial pipes line the right side. The '666th Street' building looms large on the right as the camera begins tilting upward to admire the architecture.

events.description: character reaches waterfront area with visible water surface and industrial infrastructure
camera moves into shadow beneath the elevated highway, reducing direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: exploring the waterfront area, looking up at the elevated highway structure and around at the cityscape

entered.detail: dark water surface of the waterfront canal reflecting the buildings above
underside of the massive highway structure showing detailed industrial architecture
purple neon sign with spiral design on the right side building
metal railing along the waterfront edge with pipes running along it

segments.scene_description: The character explores a waterfront promenade beneath the massive elevated highway structure. The camera pans across the dark water surface reflecting the surrounding architecture, tilts up to show the intricate underside of the highway, and captures distant skyscrapers with industrial steam vents. The area is devoid of pedestrians, creating an atmospheric, isolated feeling in the shadow of the infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic downtown that gradually shifts into a shadowed, industrial waterfront district. It begins on a bright city sidewalk dominated by the massive 666th Street building and lined with digital billboards and palm trees, where the character briefly pauses to check a handheld device. As the character crosses the asphalt street toward a yellow fuel kiosk, the towering architecture recedes into the background amidst a flow of pedestrians. The scene then transitions toward an industrial zone as the camera tilts upward to admire the looming 666th Street building and the emerging structure of a massive elevated highway. Finally, the movement leads beneath the highway onto a desolate waterfront promenade, where the camera pans across dark, reflective water and industrial steam vents to capture the isolated atmosphere of the city's infrastructure.
